mapper.insert: insert into category(shop_id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{shopId}, #{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update category
shop_id = #{shopId},
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
